case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MIRKA SAVIC et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SAVIC, MIRKA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-19-2011
DECLARATION DENISE HORNE FILED RE: CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVIC, MIRKA $3,896.64 PRINCIPAL, $775.06 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,907.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION EMILY PIERCE FILED RE: CCP SECTION 1033(B)(2) WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAVIC, MIRKA
DECLARATION RE: REDUCED FILING FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED JUN-29-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAVIC, MIRKA
